rules.rule_text:
title: Houdini RAT
id: dea7fa54-3fe1-487d-8a3e-aa99f633f3f6
description: Rule to detect houdini RAT and WSH RAT
status: stable
author: NTT Security - Robin Hellsten
date: 2024-04-18
logsource:
  category: proxy
detection:
  separator:
    c-useragent|contains:
    - <|>
    - '|false'
    - '|true'
  condition: separator
falsepositives:
- Unknown
level: medium
